explanation: One entry per (flow × role × language × phase × state) cell examined. Cells not yet examined are marked NOT_YET_EXAMINED at the flow level so gaps are explicit rather than invisible. Seven axes tracked per cell: external-vs-internal framing, role branching, language, business-logic phase/state, human-friendliness, 5-layer UX audit, follow-ups. Round 2 commits RUN-116..127c reference the audit_commit field on each passing cell.

axis_legend.axis_B_role: verdict of role-appropriate content + primary CTA
axis_legend.axis_C_language: en baseline verified; he-RTL layout flip + logical props; fr deferred
axis_legend.axis_E_human_friendly: acronym/jargon leak count + non-technical reviewer test
axis_legend.axis_F_ux_skills: 5 layers: accessibility · AI-slop · Nielsen H1/H2/H8/H9 · grammar · intent-first

all_48_flows_index.explanation: Every flow in the product with its current round-level audit status, so the 24 NOT_YET_EXAMINED flows are visible at a glance rather than buried in a sibling list. Status values: EXAMINED_PASS (detailed cells below), EXAMINED_PARTIAL (some cells passed, some still pending), TOUCHED_ROUND_2 (fix landed this round but not yet template-audited), NOT_YET_EXAMINED (no round-1/round-2 work), INTERNAL_ONLY (external adapter / no tenant UI by design).

tally.note_after_RUN-141: Round 3 closed all 9 NOT_YET_EXAMINED cells via RUN-141 (bundle-activation, profile-enrichment, saas-multi-tenancy, durable-sagas-compliance, dynamic-forms-workflows, design-intelligence-engine, rag-quality-feedback, platform-agent, module-lifecycle). 3 of those 9 needed language fixes (saas, sagas, platform-agent); the other 6 passed clean. All 48 flows + 2 addenda now have a per-round verdict.
